acceptedAnswer.text: No for minor/accepted; yes if denied or valuable.[9]
acceptedAnswer.description: Not always for minor, but yes if denied, disputed, or complex; free consults common.[1][9] Insurers minimize payouts.[2] Key factors: Insurer pushback; permanency issues. Practical guidance: Handle simple yourself via reports; lawyer for appeals/max value. Many take cases no upfront fee.[7] Boosts success odds.[9]
